'''ratono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graecunin|graecunin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graecunin|graecunin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ratono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræteneth|ræteneth]] || [[word:rætenej|rætenej]] || [[word:rætenesh|rætenesh]] || [[word:rætene|rætene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ratotonoth|ratotonoth]] || [[word:ratotonoj|ratotonoj]] || [[word:ratotonosh|ratotonosh]] || [[word:ratotono|ratotono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ratonoth|ratonoth]] || [[word:ratonoj|ratonoj]] || [[word:ratonosh|ratonosh]] || [[word:ratono|ratono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ratofnoth|ratofnoth]] || [[word:ratofnoj|ratofnoj]] || [[word:ratofnosh|ratofnosh]] || [[word:ratofnof|ratofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ratonotho|ratonotho]] || [[word:ratonojo|ratonojo]] || [[word:ratonosho|ratonosho]] || [[word:ratonoko|ratonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ratonoth|ratonoth]] || [[word:ratonoj|ratonoj]] || [[word:ratonosh|ratonosh]] || [[word:ratono|ratono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ratonothol|ratonothol]] || [[word:ratonojol|ratonojol]] || [[word:ratonoshol|ratonoshol]] || [[word:ratonokol|ratonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ratonothotho|ratonothotho]] || [[word:ratonojojo|ratonojojo]] || [[word:ratonoshosho|ratonoshosho]] || [[word:ratonoko|ratonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ratonothon|ratonothon]] || [[word:ratonojon|ratonojon]] || [[word:ratonoshon|ratonoshon]] || [[word:ratonokon|ratonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ratonothoro|ratonothoro]] || [[word:ratonojoro|ratonojoro]] || [[word:ratonoshoro|ratonoshoro]] || [[word:ratonokoro|ratonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
